Affiliate Disclosure

  1. Home
  2. /Affiliate Disclosure

Affiliate Disclosure

TB Relo (tbrelo.com) is owned and operated by Barrett Henry.

How Affiliate Links Work

Some links on this site are affiliate links. That means when you click one and make a purchase or sign up for a service, we may earn a small commission at no additional cost to you. The price you pay is the same whether you use our link or go directly to the company's website.

This income helps support the site and allows us to continue creating free relocation content for people moving to Tampa Bay.

Our Recommendations Are Honest

Affiliate relationships do not influence our recommendations. We only recommend products and services we would use ourselves or recommend to our own real estate clients. If something isn't worth your time or money, we won't link to it just because there's a commission attached.

Types of Affiliate Partners

We may have affiliate relationships with companies in the following categories:

  • Moving companies and relocation services
  • Home security systems and providers
  • Internet, cable, and streaming providers
  • Insurance comparison tools
  • Home improvement retailers
  • Storage and portable container companies

About Our Own Business Links

Barrett Henry is a licensed REALTOR and Broker Associate at REMAX Collective with 23+ years of experience in Tampa Bay real estate. Links to nowtb.com point to his own real estate business — these are not third-party affiliate links.

Similarly, links to bestbayservices.com point to Best Bay Services, Barrett's own handyman and home services company. These are also not third-party affiliate links.

FTC Compliance

This disclosure is provided in accordance with the Federal Trade Commission's 16 CFR Part 255 guidelines concerning the use of endorsements and testimonials in advertising.

Questions?

If you have questions about any of our affiliate relationships, contact us at barrett@nowtb.com.

TBRelo

Your complete guide to relocating to Tampa Bay, Florida. Covering Hillsborough, Pinellas, Pasco, Hernando, Polk, Manatee, Sarasota, and Citrus counties with honest, local insight from someone who actually lives here.
